name: PhishMailer
author: dead-plant
description: Send an email containing the description of a TheHive case or case_task.

configurationItems.name: from_addr
configurationItems.description: Valid sender email address used in the `From` header.

configurationItems.name: smtp_host
configurationItems.description: Hostname or IP address of the SMTP server.

configurationItems.name: smtp_port
configurationItems.description: Port used to connect to the SMTP server.

configurationItems.name: smtp_encryption
configurationItems.description: Connection mode: `tls` for implicit TLS, `starttls` for starttls, or `none` for an unencrypted connection.

configurationItems.name: smtp_verify
configurationItems.description: Whether to verify the SMTP server's TLS certificate.

configurationItems.name: smtp_user
configurationItems.description: SMTP authentication username. Must be provided together with `smtp_password`.

configurationItems.name: smtp_password
configurationItems.description: SMTP authentication password. Must be provided together with `smtp_user`.
